minecraft:emitter_initialization.creation_expression: v.pjfnmgv = v.pjfnmgv??1.5; v.olirsmc = 7; v.wllbyik = 16; v.tfjburc.x = 0; v.tfjburc.y = 0; v.tfjburc.z = 0; v.sztwdej = v.sztwdej??v.tfjburc;

sequence.expression: t.urwmsaq=v.pjfnmgv; t.rhxwbig=math.lerp(0.1/32, 1.25/32, (t.urwmsaq-0.5)/(12.5-0.5)); t.vihufcz=math.min(t.urwmsaq/7, 1); t.johnqjo=v.olirsmc; t.qorrogg=v.wllbyik; t.johnqjo=math.min(math.ceil(t.vihufcz*(t.johnqjo-1)/2)*2+1, t.johnqjo); t.qorrogg=math.min((math.ceil(t.vihufcz*(t.qorrogg/4-1))+1)*4, t.qorrogg); t.wxainfc=v.sztwdej;

particle_effect.pre_effect_expression: v.pjfnmgv = t.urwmsaq; v.olirsmc = t.johnqjo; v.wllbyik = t.qorrogg; v.dnqhrnp = t.rhxwbig; v.sztwdej=t.wxainfc;
v.pjfnmgv = t.urwmsaq; v.olirsmc = t.johnqjo+1; v.wllbyik = t.qorrogg; v.dnqhrnp = t.rhxwbig; v.sztwdej=t.wxainfc;
